---
name: Bug report
about: For bugs/issues with Moonwarmer
title: "[BUG] BugNameHere"
labels: bug
assignees: thej01

---

**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is. Provide an error report that UTMT (or gamemaker) throws at you, along side this.

**Mod(s) used & Moonwarmer version**
Please list the mod(s) you tried to import with Moonwarmer when the issue occurred. Also provide the Moonwarmer verison.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**UTMT Version**
Add the version of UndertaleModTool you used while patching (note, Bleeding Edge is the recommended one!)

**Additional context**
Add any other context about the problem here.
